name: Messor
description: Analog stereo VCA-based feed-forward compressor. Internal sidechain with switchable HP/LP filter, precision envelope follower, over-compression ratios, Warm tube saturation mode, and gain-reduction envelope output.

controls.name: Threshold
controls.description: Sets the level above which compression engages. LED ring indicates crossing and gain reduction amount.
controls.detail: LED ring feedback · illuminates when signal exceeds threshold

controls.name: Ratio
controls.description: Compression ratio. Sweeps from off through normal ratios into limiting and past unity into over-compression, inverting transients.
controls.detail: CCW: off · mid: 1:1 to ∞:1 · CW: negative ratios (over-compression)

controls.name: Attack
controls.description: Gain-reduction envelope rise time. Fast settings catch transients, slow settings let initial peaks punch through.

controls.name: Release
controls.description: Gain-reduction envelope fall time. Short for pumping, long for smoother levelling.

controls.name: Gain
controls.description: Makeup gain post-compression. Full CCW mutes output, turning the stage into a CV-controlled stereo VCA via Gain CV.
controls.detail: CCW: mute / VCA mode · CW: +17dB · CV controllable

controls.name: Filter Cutoff
controls.description: Cutoff for the sidechain filter that shapes what triggers compression. Lets kick/bass duck less or more depending on mode.
controls.detail: CV controllable · pairs with HP/LP mode switch

controls.name: Filter Mode Switch
controls.description: Selects sidechain filter response. HP ignores low end (vocal/drum glue), LP ignores highs (kick-focused ducking).

controls.name: Warm Switch
controls.description: Engages analog tube-style soft-clipping saturation on the output path. Adds harmonic thickness and progressive compression.

controls.name: Bypass Switch
controls.description: Routes input directly to output, skipping compressor and Warm stage for A/B comparison.

inputs.name: IN L / IN R
inputs.description: Stereo audio input. Mono sources can patch either jack.

inputs.name: SC IN
inputs.description: External sidechain input. Overrides internal sidechain path — use for classic kick-ducks-bass patches.

inputs.name: GAIN CV
inputs.description: CV over makeup gain. With Gain knob fully CCW, becomes the CV input of a stereo VCA.

outputs.name: GR OUT
outputs.description: Gain-reduction envelope as CV. Mirrors the internal ducking curve for driving other VCAs, filters, or standalone envelope-follower duties.

behaviors.name: Over-compression
behaviors.description: Past infinite ratio, Messor inverts the transient envelope — loud sections get quieter than quiet ones. Reshapes drum transients into synthetic pumping or reversed-attack shapes.

behaviors.name: Sidechain filter as key-EQ
behaviors.description: Filtering the detection path lets specific frequency bands trigger compression. HP at 200Hz ignores bass, so kick/bass don't over-compress. LP isolates lows for classic side-chain ducking.

behaviors.name: Stereo VCA mode
behaviors.trigger: Gain knob fully CCW + CV at GAIN CV
behaviors.description: With makeup at zero, GAIN CV opens the output VCA directly. Messor becomes a clean stereo VCA with threshold/ratio set to taste — compression optional.

behaviors.name: External sidechain key
behaviors.description: Patching SC IN disconnects the internal detection path. Classic kick-to-bass ducking, or feed a hi-hat to compress a pad on every tick.

behaviors.name: Gain-reduction envelope as modulation
behaviors.trigger: GR OUT patched to any CV destination
behaviors.description: GR OUT emits the compression envelope as a usable CV. Patch into filter cutoff or VCA CV to duck other voices in lockstep with the compressor, or use Messor as a dedicated envelope follower.

behaviors.name: Warm saturation
behaviors.description: Adds progressive soft-clipping tube emulation. Subtle on quiet signals, thickens as levels rise. Stacks with heavy compression to glue a full mix or drum bus.

patchIdeas.name: Four-on-floor kick duck
patchIdeas.patch: Stereo mix → IN L/R · kick trigger → external drum voice → SC IN · filter to LP ~100Hz · attack fast · release ~200ms · full mix pumps under kick
patchIdeas.diagram:
Messor:
* Filter: LP
* Attack: fast
* Release: ~200ms
* Ratio: 4:1

Mixer:

Kick:

- Mixer (Out L) -> Messor (IN L)
- Mixer (Out R) -> Messor (IN R)
- Kick (Out) -> Messor (SC IN) // key signal
- Messor (OUT L) -> Output (In L)
- Messor (OUT R) -> Output (In R)

patchIdeas.name: Messor as envelope follower
patchIdeas.patch: Percussion loop → IN · Bypass ON (audio unaffected) · GR OUT → external filter cutoff · filter breathes with the drum dynamics
patchIdeas.diagram:
Messor:
* Bypass: ON
* Attack: ~10ms
* Release: ~150ms
* Ratio: heavy

Filter:

Drums:

- Drums (Out) -> Messor (IN L)
- Messor (GR OUT) >> Filter (Cutoff) // drum envelope modulates pad filter

patchIdeas.name: Transient inverter
patchIdeas.patch: Snare → IN · Ratio full CW into over-compression · Attack medium · transient envelope flips — attack is quieter than the tail, reversed-snare effect
patchIdeas.diagram:
Messor:
* Ratio: full CW (over-compression)
* Attack: ~30ms
* Release: ~100ms
* Threshold: low

Snare:

- Snare (Out) -> Messor (IN L)
- Messor (OUT L) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Clean stereo VCA
patchIdeas.patch: Stereo pad → IN L/R · Gain full CCW · envelope → GAIN CV · Ratio off · Messor passes audio through the VCA stage only
patchIdeas.diagram:
Messor:
* Gain: full CCW
* Ratio: OFF
* Bypass: OFF

Envelope:

Pad:

- Pad (Out L) -> Messor (IN L)
- Pad (Out R) -> Messor (IN R)
- Envelope (Out) >> Messor (GAIN CV) // opens stereo VCA
- Messor (OUT L) -> Output (In L)
- Messor (OUT R) -> Output (In R)

patchIdeas.name: Pumping sidechain filter
patchIdeas.patch: Pad → IN · LFO → FLT CV (audio rate-ish) · sidechain detection sweeps the spectrum, compressor ducks and resumes as different bands cross threshold
patchIdeas.diagram:
Messor:
* Filter: HP
* Ratio: moderate
* Attack: fast

LFO:

Pad:

- Pad (Out L) -> Messor (IN L)
- LFO (Out) >> Messor (FLT CV) // sweeping sidechain
- Messor (OUT L) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Drum-bus glue
patchIdeas.patch: Drum submix → IN L/R · Warm ON · Ratio 2:1 · Attack medium · Release fast · gentle threshold · drums cohere and breathe together
patchIdeas.diagram:
Messor:
* Warm: ON
* Ratio: 2:1
* Attack: medium
* Release: fast
* Threshold: light touch

Mixer:

- Mixer (Out L) -> Messor (IN L)
- Mixer (Out R) -> Messor (IN R)
- Messor (OUT L) -> Output (In L)
- Messor (OUT R) -> Output (In R)

patchIdeas.name: Rhythmic filter ducking
patchIdeas.patch: Pad → IN · Clock → SC IN via AD envelope · every clock tick ducks the pad · HP sidechain so the tick doesn't pre-open the detector
patchIdeas.diagram:
Messor:
* Filter: HP
* Ratio: heavy
* Attack: fast
* Release: ~300ms

Clock:

AD:

Pad:

- Clock (Out) t> AD (Trig)
- AD (Out) -> Messor (SC IN) // audio-shaped key
- Pad (Out L) -> Messor (IN L)
- Messor (OUT L) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Parallel NY drum squash
patchIdeas.patch: Drum loop → Mult → IN and direct · Messor heavy over-compression + Warm · blend Messor output with dry loop at mixer · aggressive NYC-style parallel bus
patchIdeas.diagram:
Messor:
* Ratio: past limiting
* Warm: ON
* Attack: fast
* Release: fast

Mult:

Mixer:

Drums:

- Drums (Out) -> Mult (In)
- Mult (Out 1) -> Messor (IN L)
- Mult (Out 2) -> Mixer (In 1) // dry
- Messor (OUT L) -> Mixer (In 2) // crushed
- Mixer (Out) -> Output (In)
